title: 9.9% Hydroxyapatite Toothpaste 2 Pack, Fluoride-Free Nano Hydroxyapatite Toothpaste, Helps Remineralize, Protects Enamel, Relieves Sensitivity, Strengthens Teeth, Whitening, for Adult, Kids Oral Care

features: 【Strengthen & Protect Tooth Enamel】Formulated with 9.9% nano hydroxyapatite, this hydroxyapatite toothpaste actively rebuilds and fortifies enamel—the natural shield of your teeth. Enhances enamel density to prevent cavities, reduce acid erosion, and promote long-term gum health.

【Fast-Acting Sensitivity Relief】Block pain triggers at the source! Nano-hydroxyapatite fills microscopic enamel gaps, sealing exposed dentin tubules to minimize discomfort from hot, cold, or sugary foods. Experience lasting relief within weeks.

【Gentle and Effective Stain Removal】Break down stubborn coffee, wine, and plaque stains without abrasive chemicals. Our hydroxyapatite-toothpaste polishes teeth to reveal a naturally whiter smile while preventing tartar buildup.
【Long-Lasting Fresh Breath】Enjoy a crisp, natural mint flavor that neutralizes bad breath and keeps your breath fresh for hours.

【Fluoride-Free & Family-Friendly】Safe for ages 6+ and ideal for fluoride-free lifestyles. Free from parabens, and harsh additives. Dentist-recommended for daily use to maintain holistic oral wellness.
description: Product description 9.9 percent Tooth Hydroxyapatite Toothpaste is the perfect solution for a healthier, brighter smile. Power by Nano Hydroxyapatite, it repairs and protects enamel, soothes sensitive gums and strengthens teeth. Infused with natural peppermint, it delivers a refreshing, clean sensation that lasts all day. Why Choose Us? ✅ Enamel Hero: Hydroxyapatite, the natural building block of teeth, delivers 9.9% nano-sized particles to penetrate deeply, remineralize weakened enamel, and block cavity-causing acids. ✅ Sensitivity Shield: Target sensitivity at its root by sealing exposed dentin tubules. Experience relief from sharp pains caused by temperature changes or sweets. ✅ Stain Eraser: Gently dissolve stubborn plaque, tartar, and surface stains without damaging enamel. Reveal whiter teeth and a radiant smile in 4–6 weeks. ✅ Fresh & Safe: Mild mint flavor freshens breath, while fluoride-free design ensures safety for kids and adults. Perfect for: ✔️ Sensitive teeth sufferers ✔️ Families seeking fluoride-free care ✔️ Coffee/wine lovers battling stains ✔️ Anyone prioritizing enamel health How To Use: STPE 1.Simply apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to your toothbrush. STPE 2.Brush gently using the proper technique for 3-5 minutes. STPE 3.Rinse with water for a fresh, clean feeling. For best results, brush your teeth twice daily, in the morning and evening. Package 2 x 9.9% Nano Hydroxyapatite Toothpaste 120 g Disclaimer: 1.For external use only. 2.Avoid contact with eyes. 3.If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a dentist. Keep out of reach of children. 4.Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. 5.Keep the cap tightly closed to preserve the quality and freshness of the product. Directions STEP 1. Simply apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to your toothbrush. STEP 2. Brush gently using the proper technique for 3-5 minutes. STEP 3. Rinse with water for a fresh, clean feeling. For best results, brush your teeth twice daily, in the morning and evening. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a dentist. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. See more
